name: INV Metals Inc.
description: INV Metals Inc. is a Canadian mineral resource company focused on the acquisition, exploration, and development of precious and base metal projects, with its primary focus on the Loma Larga gold-copper-silver project in Ecuador. The company also holds interests in other exploration properties in Ecuador, including Las Naves and Tierras Coloradas. INV Metals was acquired by Dundee Precious Metals Inc. in 2021.
